name: Grilled Corn on the Cob
recipeInstructions:
1. Buy corn still in the husks.
2. Gently strip back the husks without tearing them.
3. Pull out all of the silks and lightly scrub at the ear to remove any remaining silks (silks are the stringy parts).
4. Replace the husks over the ear, completely enclosing it.
5. Soak the ears in a bucket of salt water overnight. This helps season the corn and keeps it moist to prevent drying out or burning on the grill.
6. Remove the ears from the salt water solution and place them directly on the grill.
7. Cook the corn as desired.
8. To eat, gently pull back the husks to create a handle, spread butter on the kernels, and enjoy.
